selection_basis: validation known-label misroute guardrail plus anecdotal OOD holdout
reason: Chose the highest OOD catch count with known misroutes <= 5% on validation.
other_holdout_note: The OOD side has only six files, so it is useful as a smoke check but too small for a statistically stable threshold.

ood_loco_validation.note: Larger synthetic OOD probe at the chosen threshold; each known class is held out of training in turn and treated as OOD. See ood_loco_curve.csv for the full curve.
